title: How quants really make money.
summary: QFEX is a 24/7 perpetual futures exchange co-founded by Annanay Kapila and Joshua Wharton in 2025. It offers up to 50x leverage on US stocks, forex, and commodities without intermediary brokers. The company raised $9.5M in seed funding in March 2026 led by General Catalyst at a $95M valuation.
